info.title: BookMyEvent API
info.description:
Ticketing system API for event organisers to create & manage events.
Users can purchase/reserve tickets for events.

post.summary: Create a seat for a venue
Create bulk seats for a venue

delete.summary: Delete bulk seats from a venue
Delete a seat from a venue

get.summary: Get seat status for an event

post.summary: Allocate seats to a ticket type

post/bulk.summary: Bulk allocate seats by rows to a ticket type

get.summary: Get seat allocations for an event

example.message: Order reserved. Please confirm within 10 minutes.

seatIds.description: Array of seat IDs to delete
Array of event seat IDs to reserve
Array of seat IDs to allocate

ticketId.description: Ticket type ID to allocate seats to
Ticket type ID to allocate seats to

seatIds.description: Array of seat IDs to lock
Array of seat IDs to book
Array of seat IDs to release
